Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.colors

Class ColorSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractPropertiesSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.colors.ColorSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class ColorSettings extends AbstractPropertiesSettings
Configurable colors for KeY.

If you need a new color use: define(String, String, Color).
